Title: User logs in successfully for the first time
Preconditions: User has never accessed the app before.
Test Steps:
1. User opens the app.
2. User is prompted to enter credentials.
3. User enters valid username and password.
4. Application sends credentials to the server.
5. Server verifies credentials against the database.
6. Server confirms valid credentials.
7. Application compares entered credentials with those in the database.
8. Application informs the user that the login was successful.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the HOME page.

Title: User logs in successfully after first access
Preconditions: User has accessed the app before.
Test Steps:
1. User opens the app.
2. User is prompted to enter credentials.
3. User enters valid username and password.
4. Application sends credentials to the server.
5. Server verifies credentials against the database.
6. Server confirms valid credentials.
7. Application compares entered credentials with those in the database.
8. Application informs the user that the login was successful.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the HOME page.

Title: User fails to log in due to invalid credentials
Preconditions: User has accessed the app before.
Test Steps:
1. User opens the app.
2. User is prompted to enter credentials.
3. User enters invalid username or password.
4. Application sends credentials to the server.
5. Server verifies credentials against the database.
6. Server confirms invalid credentials.
7. Application informs the user that the login failed.
Expected Result: User remains on the login page.

Title: User starts a trip and completes it
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the HOME page.
Test Steps:
1. User is on the HOME page.
2. User selects to start a trip.
3. Application sends trip details to the server.
4. Server processes the trip details and stores them in the database.
5. Server confirms the trip has started.
6. User completes the trip.
7. Application sends a completion signal to the server.
8. Server updates the trip status to completed.
9. Application informs the user that the trip is completed.
10. Application prompts the user to calculate emissions.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the TRAGITTO TERMINATO state.

Title: User skips emission calculation after completing a trip
Test Steps:
1. User is on the TRAGITTO TERMINATO state.
2. Application prompts the user to calculate emissions.
3. User chooses not to calculate emissions.
4. Application returns to the HOME page.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the HOME page.

Title: User calculates emissions after completing a trip
Test Steps:
1. User is on the TRAGITTO TERMINATO state.
2. Application prompts the user to calculate emissions.
3. User provides valid emission calculation details.
4. Application sends emission details to the server.
5. Server processes the emission details.
6. Server returns the calculated emissions to the application.
7. Application displays the calculated emissions to the user.
Expected Result: User sees the calculated emissions on the TRAGITTO TERMINATO state.

Title: User views weekly report
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the STATISTICHE page.
Test Steps:
1. User is on the STATISTICHE page.
2. User selects to view the weekly report.
3. Application prompts the user to confirm the report.
4. User confirms the report.
5. Application retrieves the weekly report from the server.
6. Application displays the weekly report to the user.
Expected Result: User sees the weekly report on the REPORT SETTIMANALE page.

Title: User changes section while viewing statistics
Preconditions: User is logged in and on the STATISTICHE page.

3. Application prompts the user to confirm the change.
4. User confirms the change.

Expected Result: User is redirected to the MENU ORIZZONTALE page.
